svg.desc: slime-idle idle_0: Generate a self-contained SVG 2D game asset. Use transparent background. No full-canvas background or opaque backdrop. Fit the requested frame size exactly. Set shape-rendering="crispEdges" on the SVG root. Use viewBox matching the requested size. Target size: 64x64. Output media type: image/svg+xml. Game monster sprite. Readable creature silhouette. Express simple personality through shape. Keep the creature as the only main subject. pixel art low-resolution readable clusters limited palette hard edges, no soft painterly gradients Composition contract: single centered creature body sits on lower third no props competing with face Palette hint: green or blue translucent body. Palette hint: darker lower rim. Palette hint: small white highlight. readable at 32x32 by blob outline and two eyes readable at 64x64 with soft highlight readable at 128x128 with simple volume Subject: slime. Visual archetype: blob_monster. blob monster slime. rounded blob silhouette squashable monster shape simple face soft highlight transparent background SVG shape hints: ellipse body; circle eyes; small ellipse highlight. No photorealistic. No blur. No low contrast. No cropped. No inconsistent frames. No busy background. No full-canvas background. No friendly human character. No anti-aliased painterly render. No photo texture. No humanoid armor. No hard mechanical parts.
